channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari Retains Bhabanipur Seat, Vacates Nandigram After Election Victory
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari, who recently won in both the Bhabanipur and Nandigram Assembly constituencies, has decided to retain the Bhabanipur seat and give up the Nandigram seat. On...

item.title: Helen Zille challenges Johannesburg over mismanagement of water services
item.description: Helen Zille, the DA's mayoral candidate, has approached the Johannesburg High Court, taking on the City of Johannesburg and Joburg Water over what she describes as a 'man-made' water crisis. The DA al...

item.title: Alfred and Yasmine Vargas Advocate for Anti-Bullying Awareness
item.description: Alfred Vargas, actor and public servant, along with his wife Yasmine, is actively campaigning against bullying in the Philippines. Through their advocacy, they aim to raise awareness and encourage vic...

item.title: Trump Administration Pursues Aggressive Voter Roll Purges Ahead of 2026 Elections
item.description: According to reporting highlighted by Raw Story, the Trump administration is undertaking a nationwide effort to remove tens of millions of voters from registration rolls, targeting primarily Democrati...

item.title: Senate Confirms No Arrests Will Be Made Amid Ongoing Investigation
item.description: On May 13, 2026, the Office of the Senate Affairs (OSAA) clarified that no arrests will be conducted within the Senate premises despite ongoing investigations into certain matters. The statement came ...

item.title: Constitutional Court Rules Against Multiple Asylum Applications in South Africa
item.description: The South African Department of Home Affairs has achieved a major legal victory in its efforts to prevent abuse of the asylum system. The Constitutional Court, in the case of Director-General, Departm...

item.title: xAI Expands Gas Turbine Use at Southaven Data Center Amid Environmental Lawsuit
item.description: xAI has installed 19 additional portable natural gas turbines at its Colossus 2 data center in Southaven, Mississippi, raising concerns over air quality and regulatory compliance. Internal emails obta...

item.title: Lee Lai’s Graphic Novel Cannon Wins the 2026 Stella Prize
item.description: Lee Lai has made history as the first graphic novelist to win the 2026 Stella Prize with her work Cannon. Previously shortlisted in 2022 for Stone Fruit, Lai has contributed to prestigious publication...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa Under Protective Custody Amid ICC Warrant
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa is currently under protective custody within the Senate compound following the issuance of an International Criminal Court (ICC) arrest warrant li...

item.title: American Passengers Quarantined After Hantavirus Outbreak on South Atlantic Cruise
item.description: Jake Rosmarin, a 30-year-old content creator from Boston, is among 18 Americans quarantined following a hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius in the South Atlantic. He is expected to spend 42 days at ...

item.title: Expert-recommended probiotics for supporting gut health and digestion
item.description: Gut health has become a major focus in wellness, with research linking a healthy microbiome to benefits across multiple bodily systems, including mood, skin, and immunity. Probiotic supplements can co...

item.title: A Look Back at Camilla Horn’s Career Through 1920s and 1930s Postcards
item.description: Camilla Horn (1903–1996) was a celebrated German actress and dancer, known for her transition from silent films to sound cinema, achieving success both in Hollywood and Europe. Discovered by renowned ...

item.title: Congress leader Sonia Gandhi undergoes minor medical procedure at Gurugram hospital
item.description: Congress veteran and Rajya Sabha MP, Sonia Gandhi, aged 79, was admitted to Medanta Hospital in Gurugram late on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, for a minor medical procedure. According to sources, she arrived...

item.title: Nollywood actor Alex Ekubo passes away at 40 after illness
item.description: The Nigerian film industry don dey mourn as popular actor Alex Ekubo don pass away at the age of 40. According to reports, him die after battling sickness wey dey him for some time. Veteran actress Ka...

item.title: French Woman Critically Ill from Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
item.description: A French woman infected during a hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship is critically ill and receiving life-support treatment at Bichat Hospital in Paris. The patient is on an artificial l...

item.title: Tanzania Maintains Stable Inflation at 3.2% in March 2026 with Easing Food Prices
item.description: According to the National Bureau of Statistics, Tanzania's annual headline inflation remained stable at 3.2% in March 2026, same as in February. This stability comes as food and non-alcoholic beverage...

item.title: Comelec clarifies that losing candidates from 2025 elections are now eligible for government positions
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced that candidates who lost in the May 2025 midterm elections are now eligible to be appointed to any government position, following the completion of the ...

item.title: Keir Starmer faces Labour divisions as King Charles III delivers Government agenda
item.description: King Charles III is set to deliver the annual King's Speech, outlining the government's legislative agenda for the year, amid significant internal divisions within the Labour Party. The speech will re...

item.title: Nintendo Announces Release of Mineru's Construct Amiibo for Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
item.description: Nintendo has officially announced the release of the 'Mineru's Construct' amiibo for The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom. Pre-orders are now available on Nintendo's US store for $34.99, and the ...

item.title: Emmet Gowin: Four Decades of Family Photography and Intimate Portraits
item.description: Emmet Gowin’s photographic collection, Baldwin Street: Photographs 1966-1994, showcases his deep commitment to capturing the intimate moments of family life over four decades. Published alongside his ...
